title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy discuss warning signs for the AI boom including companies reconsidering AI spend due to token consumption growth, only 18% of tokens spent on shipped products, and circular investment dynamics. They also cover Anthropic's valuation milestone, AI trading via Robinhood, and privacy-ethics questions around AI services.
